% This is generated by ESQL's AbstractFunctionTestCase. Do not edit it. See ../README.md for how to regenerate it.

### TSTEP
Creates end-aligned time buckets over @timestamp using a fixed step. The end anchor is taken from TRANGE when present,
or from the current query time otherwise.

```esql
FROM sample_data
| WHERE TRANGE("2023-10-23T12:15:00.000Z", "2023-10-23T13:55:01.543Z")
| STATS min = MIN(@timestamp), max = MAX(@timestamp) BY bucket = TSTEP(1 hour)
| SORT min
```
